.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 for the main build and test jobs.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.why_exists: The project has migrated its minimum runtime to Java 21; using Java 11 would cause compilation failures against the new source code and dependencies.

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 for specific generated application tests.
.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.why_exists: Generated applications targeting Java 21 require the JDK 21 runtime to compile and run tests successfully.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0-RC2 to align with Java 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to enforce JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features/compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer rule to require Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build would allow execution on Java 17, which is incompatible with the new Spring Boot 3.2+ and Java 21 codebase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Springfox with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE namespace); code using Springfox annotations will fail to compile or start.
